_comment: Pre-loaded public demo ACFRs (PRD F1). davenport_ia_fy2023 has a PARTIALLY degraded text layer: pypdf extracts garbage, but unpdf/pdf.js decodes most pages — measured 43/179 pages flagged needs_ocr by lib/ocr/detect.ts (24%, below the 30% whole-document 'degraded' threshold). Flagged pages are excluded from LLM context; it remains the OCR-fallback test case for phase 6. Note: the design prototype's 'Davenport FY2025 / 214 pages' labels are placeholder fiction; these are the real file facts.
